title: (Bearish Signal) MRNA, RSI Indicator left the overbought zone on April 19, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a signal that MRNA's price could be shifting from an uptrend to a downtrend. Traders may consider selling the stock or exploring put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked back and found 27 similar cases where MRNA's RSI Indicator left the overbought zone, and in 23 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 85%. Current price $154.33 crossed the resistance line at $152.89 and is trading between $221.10 resistance and $152.89 resistance lines. Throughout the month of 03/17/21 - 04/19/21, the price experienced a +10% Uptrend. During the week of 04/12/21 - 04/19/21, the stock enjoyed a +16% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/tfbe0co3lcu61.png?width=1519&format=png&auto=webp&s=a84fc43d85c2b181176c96c4ade935c7b2bd1d39

**Bearish Trend Analysis**

The Stochastic Indicator demonstrated that the ticker has stayed in the overbought zone for 6 days. The longer the ticker stays in the overbought zone, the sooner a price pull-back is expected.

Following a 3-day decline, the stock is projected to fall further. Considering past instances where MRNA declined for three days, the price rose further in 50 of 62 cases within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 80%.

MRNA broke above its upper Bollinger Band on April 16, 2021. This could be a sign that the stock is set to drop as the stock moves back below the upper band and toward the middle band. You may want to consider selling the stock or exploring put options.

The Aroon Indicator for MRNA entered a downward trend on April 06, 2021. This could indicate a strong downward move is ahead for the stock. Traders may want to consider selling the stock or buying put options.
